name: Inotiv, Inc.
summary: Inotiv, Inc. is a leading contract research organization (CRO) providing nonclinical and analytical drug discovery and development services primarily to the pharmaceutical and medical device industries. The company also sells research-quality animals (including non-human primates) and diets to pharmaceutical, biotech, academia, and government clients. Inotiv focuses on bringing new drugs and medical devices through discovery and preclinical phases, and in certain cases clinical phases, while improving efficiency and reducing development costs.

products.name: Nonclinical Drug Discovery and Development Services
products.description: Contract research services supporting preclinical and in some cases clinical phases of drug and medical device development.

products.name: Analytical Drug Development Services
products.description: Analytical services supporting drug discovery and development for pharmaceutical and medical device industries.

products.name: Research-Quality Animals
products.description: Sale of research animals including non-human primates (NHPs) to pharmaceutical, biotech, academia, and government clients.

products.name: Research Diets
products.description: Sale of research-quality diets to pharmaceutical, biotech, academia, and government clients.
